violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items in prep cooler, reach-in cooler found undated.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Counter top where dough was raising needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Prep cooler, reach-in cooler was found very dirty - All equipment needs to be deep cleaned. - All countertops, shelves need a cleaned - Handles on equipment need to be cleaned. -Seals on all equipment needs to be cleaned. - Freezers need to be thawed out.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. - Pizza boxes found on floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors need to be deep cleaned. - Walls needs to be cleaned. - Oven and walls by oven need to be cleaned - Floors under equipment needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
